projectDescription: Fontcy is a free, open-source fancy Unicode text generator for social media, bios, and anywhere custom fonts aren't supported.
keyFeatures: 18 Unicode font styles including Bold Sans, Italic Sans, Script, Fraktur, Double Struck, and more
Real-time text preview as you type
Completely ad-free and always free to use
Lightweight — pure HTML, CSS, and JavaScript with no dependencies
Easy to self-host or fork and customize
publicApiSurface: styles object — mapping of font names to Unicode character arrays
translate(text, mapping) — converts plain text to Unicode styled text
render() — updates all font preview boxes in the UI
navigator.clipboard.writeText() — copies styled text on box click
